_comment: Synthetic Microsoft Purview Sensitive Information Type (SIT) export for v1 testing. Real Graph API calls land in v1.1; this fixture mirrors the shape of `informationProtection/sensitivityLabels` + custom-SIT exports closely enough that the parsing logic is meaningful. Five entries cover the categories Mahdi typically deals with on engagements.

informationTypes.description: Names listed in the engagement scope document; org-specific.
Network layout disclosure; mask rather than block during early discovery.
Employee email addresses; mask to preserve workflow context without leaking identity.

_v1_1_todo: Replace this static fixture with a live fetch from Microsoft Graph: GET /security/informationProtection/sensitivityLabels and translate each label/SIT into a PolicyRule. Authentication via service principal or managed identity per the operator's tenant config. Out of scope for v1.
